stories.title: **Headline:** Ohtani's Jackie Robinson Day Masterpiece — 10 Strikeouts, Pitcher Only, Dodgers Sweep Mets

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani on Jackie Robinson Day:

6 IP. 1 R. 10 Ks. 95 pitches.
Struck out the side in the 6th on 14 pitches.

Didn't bat — HBP kept him out of the lineup.
First time since May 2021.

Best player in baseball. #Dodgers #BallparkBanter #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
For context on Ohtani's Jackie Robinson Day start:

He pitched and didn't bat for the first time since 2021.
His manager said: "If not for the HBP, he'd have been DHing too."

Dodgers 8, Mets 2. Swept.

Pitcher-only Ohtani is still a problem. #Dodgers #BallparkBanter #MLB

article.headline: Ohtani's Jackie Robinson Day Masterpiece — 10 Ks, Pitcher Only, Dodgers Sweep Mets

stories.title: **Headline:** Jordan Walker Is Doing Something No Cardinal Has Done Since Mark McGwire

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Jordan Walker leads MLB with 8 HRs in 16 games.

He hit 11 homers in his first 2 seasons combined.
Exit velocity: 97.1 mph — leads the majors.
wRC+: 219.

Only Pujols, Rolen, and McGwire did this in Cardinals history. #Cardinals #BallparkBanter #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
In 2024-25, Jordan Walker hit .211/.270/.324 in 527 at-bats.
Just 11 home runs.

Through 16 games in 2026: .333/.394/.767 with 8 HRs.

This is not a hot streak. Something changed.

The Cardinals might have a superstar. #Cardinals #BallparkBanter #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Jackie Robinson Day 2026 — 79th Anniversary, Dodger Stadium Ceremony, All 30 Teams Wear No. 42

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Yesterday was Jackie Robinson Day. All 30 teams wore No. 42.

Robinson's granddaughters and the Negro Leagues Museum president honored his legacy at Dodger Stadium.

79 years since April 15, 1947. #JackieRobinsonDay #BallparkBanter #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Lucas Giolito Still Available — Cubs and Padres Circle as Pitching Injuries Mount

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Lucas Giolito is still a free agent in mid-April 2026.

3.41 ERA in 145 IP last season for the Red Sox.
Cubs and Padres are circling. Pitching injuries are mounting.

Giolito: just wants to be paid close to his market value.

A deal is coming. #BallparkBanter #MLB #FreeAgency

stories.title: **Headline:** Brewers Spiral Reaches 6-Game Losing Streak — Their Longest Since 2003

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Milwaukee Brewers have lost 6 in a row. Their longest skid since 2003.

On the IL: Yelich, Chourio, Vaughn, Priester, Koenig.

That's your entire projected core — gone.

The NL Central race just got a lot more interesting. #Brewers #BallparkBanter #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** MLB Players Sound Off on the New Automated Ball-Strike Challenge System

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
MLB players on the new ball-strike challenge system:

"It's harder than it looks on TV."

Some love it. Some miss the gray area. All figuring it out.

Baseball's biggest rule change in years is live. #BallparkBanter #MLB #BaseballRules

stories.title: **Headline:** Aaron Judge at 7 HRs — Tracking Toward 400 Career Home Runs

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge's 47th career multi-home run game passed Mickey Mantle (46)
for 2nd in Yankees history.

Only Babe Ruth (68) has more.

Judge is tracking toward 400 career home runs — a club with 59 members.

Still in April. Still historic. #Yankees #BallparkBanter #MLB
